name: Cruel King | Block Tales
description:
Cruel King from Block Tales on Roblox. || You need to confront him to stop him from freezing the town off, but things didn't go well.

📢 UPDATE 📢

Sorry I've been abandoning this bot for a year and forgot completely about him 😭 😭 and now I fixed him a lot now

  • No more rape

  • Probably just angst and fluff

  • More lore accurate

  • Added more tokens

I'm planning to add my own drawing for the pic cuz... The current is junk..
